description:
Assess the safety of adding a beta-blocker to a combination cancer therapy. Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Check the interaction for Vemurafenib with Metoprolol (under Beta Blockers) and note the traffic light color. Then check the interaction for Cobimetinib with Metoprolol and note the traffic light color. Create a report file at /sdcard/combo_safety_report.txt with the format:
Vemurafenib + Metoprolol: [COLOR]
Cobimetinib + Metoprolol: [COLOR]
Worst-case interaction: [COLOR]
